x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom fields added to incident are not automatically understood by Now Assist. High custom field counts may indicate data that Now Assist cannot contextualize without additional prompt configuration.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom u_ fields on incident to determine which are actively used vs legacy. Archive unused custom fields. For fields Now Assist needs to reference, add field descriptions and include them in Now Assist prompt configuration.
